Such conduct supports digital personation and deception-based cheating provisions under Indian cybercrime law.
ai_analysis.recommended_action: Immediate blocking review under IT Act S.69A and referral for takedown/IOC dissemination.
ai_analysis.victim_profile: Indian consumers and account holders targeted through digital impersonation.

FairPlay – India Best Sports Betting Live Site

The FairPlay Pro bookmaker and casino is a newcomer on the Indian market, but the platform has already managed to gain a huge player base. To stand out from the competition, the website is set to revolutionize sports betting in India with a better choice of betting options, more profitable odds, and focus on major sports types. The casino section of the site has plenty of classic card and table games with live dealers, as well as exotic titles and game shows.

JOIN NOW
SIGN UP and GRAB YOUR
200% DEPOSIT BONUS and 50,000 INR

FairPlay Promo Code India

FairPlay rewards its active players with random and seasonal bonuses that come as gift cards and promo codes. Make sure you agree to receive newsletters and notifications from the platform via phone and email to receive codes. You can also check out affiliate websites for exclusive promo codes and get all sorts of hefty offers. Typically, it’s a match bonus for your next deposit to spend either in the sportsbook or casino section.

Once you find or receive a promo code, you can use it in a few steps:

Log in to FairPlay and click on the wallet icon in the upper-right corner;
Scroll down and click the “Redeem Gift Card” button;
Enter the code in the corresponding form and hit “Redeem.”

All bonuses obtained from gift cards come with wagering requirements. You can get acquainted with them in Rules and Regulations. Apart from promotional codes, you can also benefit from referral and affiliate ones upon registration. You get bonus money while the person who referred you or FairPlay’s affiliate gets extra money each time you make a deposit.

⠀COPY

GET BONUS
Active until: 11th of July 2025 AM
FairPlay Live Website Interface
Interface Cricket Tab
Interface Main Screen
Interface News

The overall design of the platform is done in dark tones with a pinch of orange. The welcome page greets you with the latest promotions and announcements. Scrolling down, you’ll find bars with brief info about FairPlay games, the loyalty program, game providers, available payment methods, and the button to download the mobile app.

The buttons for login and registration are right where you expect – in the upper-right part of the page. To the left of them, you’ll find the Menu tab with nine sections: Markets, News, About Us, Tutorials, Privacy Policy, FAQs, Promotions, Loyalty, and Affiliates.

Right below the menu and the login button are the main sections of the site:

Inplay. This is where you can find all games currently playing, with the available sports to the left and the list of all events in the center. Clicking on the green “play” button near the event, you can access the live broadcast.
Cricket, Soccer, and Tennis. These are three separate tabs for the major sports covered on FairPlay. They share the same interface, with the list of leagues and matches to the left, the high odds in the middle, and the bet slip to the right.
Premium Sportsbook. That’s where you can find other types of sports on the platform. The overall design of this section is different from the rest of the site, but the layout is mostly the same. The list of available sports, as well as the “Live,” “Schedule,” and “My bets” tabs are on the left, the list of events is in the middle, and the bet slip is in the lower-right corner.
Live casino. In this category, you’ll find the majority of live games on the site. The section is separated into several tabs.
Live Cards. This one contains the list of live dealer card games.
Slots. This tab has all slots you can play on the platform.
JOIN NOW
FairPlay Sports Types of Bets

The bookie focuses on three sports types (cricket, tennis, and soccer), covering all major leagues and tournaments. Apart from that, the site has 29 other sports ranging from baseball and basketball to snooker and stock car racing. Fans of eSports can bet on events in seven categories in FairPlay sports: FIFA, eCricket, eFighting, NBA 2K, eTennis, Rocket League, and eSoccer. The site also accepts bets on Dota 2 and Counter Strike events.

As for bet types, players can choose from three available options:

Single. A simple bet made on one particular outcome.
Combo. It’s a chain where each following bet multiplies the previous one. If at least one bet in the chain loses, the combo falls apart.
System. Similar to a Combo, a System bet combines several events in a chain, but it won’t fall apart if one or several bets lose.

In addition to bet types, FairPlay provides a great selection of markets for every individual sport. The main market types include:

Match (1X2). A bet on one of three outcomes, which are the win of one of the teams or a draw.
Correct Score. A bet on a particular game score by the end of the match.
Over/Under. A bet on the number of occurrences like goals, corners, points, penalties, etc. being higher or lower than a certain predetermined number.
Odd/Even. A bet on a number of occurrences being odd (1, 3, 5, etc.) or even (2, 4, 6, etc.).
Half-time/Full-time. A bet on the outcome of half-time or the full match.
Handicap. Additional bets that boost the odds.

Some markets are common to all sports, while others are unique to certain types of disciplines.

How to Register into FairPlay?

You’re free to browse the website and explore the list of available sports without registering, but if you want to start betting with real money or play online casino, you need to sign up. The process is quite smooth and takes only four steps:

1

Visit FairPlay and click on the “Join Now” button in the top-right corner of the screen.

2

On the new page, fill in the registration form. The official site will ask you for the standard info.

3

Agree to receive promotional letters (optional). Double-check the info you provided and click “Register”;

4

On the next page, type in the code you received in the SMS and complete the captcha.

REGISTRATION

That’s it. The site will take you to the main page and ask you to accept the terms and conditions. From this moment, you can deposit, bet on sports, and play casino games. But you won’t have full access to FairPlay features until you pass the verification procedure.

Account Verification

Apart from simple verification through phone number, you may have to pass a document check to withdraw your winnings. This way, you guarantee that the winnings go straight to your account and prove that you’ve reached the legal age of 18 years old. You may either wait until the administration sends you a request to confirm your ID or contact the support service yourself:

1

Head to the live chat in the lower-right part of the main page;

2

Inform the support that you want to confirm your identity and wait for the response with instructions;

3

Provide copies of one of the following documents;

4

Wait until the administration verifies the info. You’ll receive a message with the results.

The verification process lasts for around 1-2 days. After you pass it, there won’t be any problems with withdrawals in the future. Keep in mind that the website may use your data to perform extra checks like ordering your credit report.

FairPlay Club Account Deletion

In case you want to quit playing or don’t want to be a member of FairPlay anymore, the site offers an option to close your account by contacting the support team. The account won’t be deleted instantly after your request is approved, so you’ll be able to restore access to it through the Client Service.

Alternatively, you can simply restrict access to your profile with the “Self-Exclude” feature. Reach out to support and select one of the available self-exclusion periods: 6 months, 1 year, 2 years, 3 years, 4 years, and 5 years.

Once the website’s support receives your request, FairPlay will reach out to you to settle questions regarding the money left on your player account, bonus funds, and cancel any outstanding bets you have at the moment. Keep in mind that you’ll be excluded from all platforms operated by the FairPlay Group.

If you’re opting for something less radical, feel free to use the “Take a Break” option. It’s similar to self-exclusion but with smaller time periods ranging from 24 hours to 6 weeks.

How to Place a Bet at FairPlay?

Thanks to a simple and user-friendly UI, placing a bet on FairPlay.pro is quick. Note that the platform has two separate betting sections with slightly different interfaces.

To bet on cricket, tennis, or soccer in their dedicated sections:

Sign up or log in and make a deposit;
On the main page, click on the “Soccer,” “Cricket,” or “Tennis” tab;
Scroll through the list of games and click on the one you need;
Select the market and click on the odds;
In the bet slip to the right, adjust the odds (optional) and enter the stake amount;
Confirm the bet before placing and hit “Place bet.”

For betting on other sports types, head to the “Premium Sportsbook” section:

Select the sport from the list to the left;
Click on the game to open the market menu;
Choose the market;
In the bet slip, select the type of bet (combo and system are available when choosing 2 or more markets), set the stake amount, agree to odds changes, and click “Place Bet.”

You can track all ongoing bets in the “Open bets” section.

BET NOW

FairPlay Live Casino

The “Live Casino” section on FairPlay is powered by Evolution Gaming. Upon visiting it, you get into a lobby, from which you can select the game. Overall, there are eight separate tabs in the section:

Top games.

This is where you can find all popular table and card titles, as well as game shows;

Roulette.

You can choose from 16 Roulette variations, including French, American, Lightning, Immersive, VIP Roulette, and so on;

Baccarat.

This section contains 33 options, which are mostly different tables for the same game. Here, you’ll also find a table for Fan Tan;

Blackjack.

This tab offers 67 Blackjack tables for different variations of the iconic game;

Dice.

Fans of Sic Bo and the classic dice can play both games (one table per option);

Poker.

Try your hand at one of six Poker variations: classic and 2-Hand Casino Hold’em, Extreme Texas Hold’em, Caribbean Stud, Triple Card Poker, and Texas Hold’em Bonus Poker;

Game Shows.

This section is for Wheel of Fortune type games played with hosts. You can play Dream Catcher, Cash or Crash, Crazy Time, and Mega Ball in addition to Football Studio Roulette and dice tables;

First Person.

These are variations of classic online games that offer more immersion through first-person gameplay.

Live Card

In this tab, you’ll find 13 card games, most of which are unavailable in the “Live Casino” section. The list includes a few exotic options you won’t find on other platforms in India:

Teen Patti Live (two tables);
Andar Bahar;
Poker;
7 Up 7 Down;
32 Cards;
Hi-Lo;
Amar Akbar;
Dragon Tiger;
Bollywood Casino;
20-20;
6-player Poker’
Worli Matka.
Slot Games

While the choice of titles in the “Slots” category is quite modest (only 41 games are available at the moment), Fairplay features some of the top games on the market, such as:

Gonzo’s Quest. One of the top NetEnt titles, Gonzo’s Quest takes to the legendary city of Eldorado. The game offers a high RTP of 95.97 and great mechanics like avalanche reels that replace matching symbols with new ones to form more combos.
Narcos. One of the newest NetEnt games, the Narcos slot was inspired by the same-named American TV show. The game immerses you into the atmosphere of danger and cartels, and the RTP of 96.27% guarantees large winnings.
Starburst. This iconic slot is known to every casino player around the world. Developed by NetEnt, the game offers a decent RTP of 96.09% and a plethora of bonus features like expanding wilds and respins.

Besides that, FairPlay has several slots dedicated to famous rock bands and Chinese culture.

FairPlay Payment Options for Players from India

The wallet section on FairPlay is different from what you expect to see on a online betting site. Entering the deposit page, you won’t find a familiar selection of payment options. Instead, you’ll see three general options.

Deposit Methods

To deposit money on your player account, you can use the following methods:

Method	Minimum Deposit	Maximum Deposit
Payment Gateway (UPI, PayTM, Netbanking)	₹500	₹500,000
Bank Transfer	₹5,000	₹500,000
Crypto Transfers (BTC, BTH, ETH)	₹3,721 (ETH)₹1,860 (BTC)₹1,116 (BTH)	Not set
Offline Transfers	Individual	
Withdrawal Methods

As for withdrawals, you have two major options:

Method	Minimum Deposit	Maximum Deposit
Bank Transfer	₹1,000	Unlimited
Offline Transfers	Individual	

Before you can withdraw cash through a bank transfer, you need to add a bank account to your profile. It takes around 12 hours to process a withdrawal request. To cash in and out with offline transfers, you need to contact support.

FairPlay App – Android and iOS

If you want to keep track of your bets on the go, FairPlay offers a user-friendly mobile application. Powered by your device’s hardware, the app guarantees high speed and quality of casino games and zero lags when you bet on sports.

Mobile App for Android Devices

The version for Android-based gadgets welcomes players with the familiar design with the FairPlay logo on top, the menu bar to the top left, and then the log in and Join Now buttons to the right. The FairPlay registration process follows the desktop site, and if you’re already a member, you can access your Fairplay account with your email and password.

The bar with the Sportsbook, Casino, Live Cards, and Slots tabs is slightly different from the one in the PC version. Sections with cricket, soccer, and tennis events have a separate bar.

It only takes a few steps to install the app:

Go to your device’s settings, proceed to “Security” > “Unknown sources,” and allow installing third-party software;
Head to the FairPlay Club welcome page via a mobile browser, scroll down, and tap the “Download the Fairplay App” button to get the .apk file;
Once the file is downloaded, open it and confirm the installation.

You can now register or log in and enjoy top-notch casino games and a variety of betting options.

System Requirements

Before downloading the mobile app on your Android device, make sure it meets the following requirements:

Android version	6.0+
.apk file size	18.2 MB
RAM	2 GB+
Processor frequency	1.2 GHz+

The app may work on gadgets with lower specs, but its stability isn’t guaranteed.

DOWNLOAD APP

App for iPhone and iPad 

At the moment, FairPlay only has an app for Android devices. If you want to play on the go via an iOS-based gadget, you can sign up on the mobile website that works with almost all iPhones and iPads on the market.

System Requirements

Since the mobile website doesn’t have strict hardware requirements, you only need to be sure your device runs iOS 11.0 and higher.

FairPlay Mobile Website

In case you don’t want to install the application or your device doesn’t meet the technical requirements, feel free to sign up through the mobile FairPlay website. It offers the same set of features as the desktop and app versions. You can:

Bet on sports;
Play slots and online casino games;
Deposit and withdraw;
Claim Fairplay bonuses;
Manage your account;
Read news and so on.

When it comes to the visuals, the mobile version is a complete copy of the desktop site. Almost all elements of the interface are in the same place. The menu tab is in the upper-left part and the profile, wallet, and search bar are to the right. You won’t find the “Open Bets” section in its initial place, as well as the “News” and “Blogs” tabs. The interface has been narrowed to fit phone and tablet screens. The site itself is quick and responsive.The mobile FairPlay site has a few advantages over the application, such as simpler requirements, and it doesn’t eat up memory space. But when it comes to speed, the app is somewhat superior.

JOIN NOW
Why is FairPlay the Best Choice for Players from India?

With sports betting rapidly entering the lives of users from India, dozens of bookmaker’s have entered the Indian market. FairPlay is set to stand out from the competition, legally operating under Curacao licensing. The platform has been developed with convenient betting and casino experience in mind, catering to every player’s needs. Thanks to the technologies implemented during FairPlay’s development and the attitude towards Indian bettors, the site offers a plethora of benefits:

The highest betting odds currently available on the market. At the moment, the FairPlay betting company is the only bookmaker that calculates odds based on players’ bets. This results in a fair betting experience and more profits.
The website comes with the biggest selection of options for advance and fancy markets spanning every top league in such sports as cricket, tennis, and soccer.
The speed of bet acceptance on the platform is higher than on any online bookmaker in India.
A unique deposit and withdrawal system that includes a variety of banking methods, You can choose from bank transfers, card payments, and digital wallets. Apart from that, players can make payments in several cryptocurrencies.
Latest security technologies that keep personal information safe. The current list of safety measures includes SSL encryption that protects the data when you share it and Firewall that doesn’t allow third parties to access info on the website’s servers.
 In-built player for watching live broadcasts of major sports events covered on FairPlay.
A wide array of live dealer games that offer a true-to-life experience. Play your favorite card games and Roulette with real croupiers.
A hefty 100% match bonus for your first deposit at Fairplay. Get acquainted with the world of sports betting without risking your bankroll.
Player settings with customizable bet amounts.

Competent and friendly customer Fairplay support team is available around the clock, as well as a detailed FAQ section and video tutorials.

License and Regulation

FairPlay Club is licensed by Gaming Curacao, a company regulated by the Curacao eGaming Commission. The platform is legally allowed to provide site for sports betting and casino services in countries that recognize a CGC license or don’t regulate online betting and gambling, so Indian residents can safely play here.

Take note that the website reserves the right to use your personal info to perform checks and is obliged to disclose it if required by the law. Apart from that, the FairPlay official website may share your data with carefully selected partners. The site never gathers personal information without your knowledge. The platform may also restrict access to its services, as well as void or withhold bets under certain conditions like technical failures or any other malfunction that threatens its integrity.

Players aren’t allowed to have multiple accounts on the website. If the platform proves that the bettor operates more than one account, it may void bets or withhold winnings obtained through all accounts of the player.

FairPlay Sports Restricted Countries

FairPlay India offers top-notch betting and gambling all around the world, including the Asian region. Thanks to the license issued by a company based in Curacao, the platform is allowed to legally operate in almost every country in the European Union. However, players from the following countries are prohibited from playing games:

Canada;
China;
Sweden;
Russia;
Ukraine;
The USA.

While the Live Casino and Slots sections are unavailable for players in these regions, they still can enjoy sports betting.

Is FairPlay Legal in India?

Since Indian laws don’t provide solid restrictions for betting and gambling websites registered offshore, FairPlay is legal in the country. You won’t face any problems with the law for playing on the website. The only penalty you may face is an exclusion if you’re under 18.

Support

At the moment, you can get in touch with the support team through a live chat in the bottom-right corner of any page on the website. You can expect to get help around the clock, and the response time is quite short around 5 minutes.

On the other hand, you may not need to contact support at all because FairPlay has a detailed FAQ section that you can access both through a separate tab at the bottom of the main page or via the live chat window. It contains answers to dozens of questions regarding general gameplay, banking, account creation, and so on. Additionally, the website provides video tutorials for the most common types of interaction like placing bets, withdrawing money, etc.

FAQ

Can I bet or play games without registering?
What bonuses can I claim at FairPlay?
Can I trust games at FairPlay?
Can I register from outside India?
What do I need to withdraw from FairPlay?

Single. A simple bet made on one particular outcome.
Combo. It’s a chain where each following bet multiplies the previous one. If at least one bet in the chain loses, the combo falls apart.
System. Similar to a Combo, a System bet combines several events in a chain, but it won’t fall apart if one or several bets lose.

In addition to bet types, FairPlay provides a great selection of markets for every individual sport. The main market types include:

Match (1X2). A bet on one of three outcomes, which are the win of one of the teams or a draw.
Correct Score. A bet on a particular game score by the end of the match.
Over/Under. A bet on the number of occurrences like goals, corners, points, penalties, etc. being higher or lower than a certain predetermined number.
Odd/Even. A bet on a number of occurrences being odd (1, 3, 5, etc.) or even (2, 4, 6, etc.).
Half-time/Full-time. A bet on the outcome of half-time or the full match.
Handicap. Additional bets that boost the odds.

Some markets are common to all sports, while others are unique to certain types of disciplines.

How to Register into FairPlay?

You’re free to browse the website and explore the list of available sports without registering, but if you want to start betting with real money or play online casino, you need to sign up. The process is quite smooth and takes only four steps:

2

3

Agree to receive promotional letters (optional). Double-check the info you provided and click “Register”;

4

On the next page, type in the code you received in the SMS and complete the captcha.

REGISTRATION

That’s it. The site will take you to the main page and ask you to accept the terms and conditions. From this moment, you can deposit, bet on sports, and play casino games. But you won’t have full access to FairPlay features until you pass the verification procedure.

The verification process lasts for around 1-2 days. After you pass it, there won’t be any problems with withdrawals in the future. Keep in mind that the website may use your data to perform extra checks like ordering your credit report.

FairPlay Club Account Deletion

In case you want to quit playing or don’t want to be a member of FairPlay anymore, the site offers an option to close your account by contacting the support team. The account won’t be deleted instantly after your request is approved, so you’ll be able to restore access to it through the Client Service.

Alternatively, you can simply restrict access to your profile with the “Self-Exclude” feature. Reach out to support and select one of the available self-exclusion periods: 6 months, 1 year, 2 years, 3 years, 4 years, and 5 years.

Once the website’s support receives your request, FairPlay will reach out to you to settle questions regarding the money left on your player account, bonus funds, and cancel any outstanding bets you have at the moment. Keep in mind that you’ll be excluded from all platforms operated by the FairPlay Group.

If you’re opting for something less radical, feel free to use the “Take a Break” option. It’s similar to self-exclusion but with smaller time periods ranging from 24 hours to 6 weeks.

How to Place a Bet at FairPlay?

Thanks to a simple and user-friendly UI, placing a bet on FairPlay.pro is quick. Note that the platform has two separate betting sections with slightly different interfaces.

Scroll through the list of games and click on the one you need;
Select the market and click on the odds;
In the bet slip to the right, adjust the odds (optional) and enter the stake amount;
Confirm the bet before placing and hit “Place bet.”

For betting on other sports types, head to the “Premium Sportsbook” section:

Select the sport from the list to the left;
Click on the game to open the market menu;
Choose the market;
In the bet slip, select the type of bet (combo and system are available when choosing 2 or more markets), set the stake amount, agree to odds changes, and click “Place Bet.”

You can track all ongoing bets in the “Open bets” section.

License and Regulation

FairPlay Club is licensed by Gaming Curacao, a company regulated by the Curacao eGaming Commission. The platform is legally allowed to provide site for sports betting and casino services in countries that recognize a CGC license or don’t regulate online betting and gambling, so Indian residents can safely play here.

Take note that the website reserves the right to use your personal info to perform checks and is obliged to disclose it if required by the law. Apart from that, the FairPlay official website may share your data with carefully selected partners. The site never gathers personal information without your knowledge. The platform may also restrict access to its services, as well as void or withhold bets under certain conditions like technical failures or any other malfunction that threatens its integrity.

Players aren’t allowed to have multiple accounts on the website. If the platform proves that the bettor operates more than one account, it may void bets or withhold winnings obtained through all accounts of the player.

FairPlay Sports Restricted Countries

FairPlay India offers top-notch betting and gambling all around the world, including the Asian region. Is FairPlay Legal in India?

Since Indian laws don’t provide solid restrictions for betting and gambling websites registered offshore, FairPlay is legal in the country. You won’t face any problems with the law for playing on the website. The only penalty you may face is an exclusion if you’re under 18.
